TÜBİTAK-NSF Bilateral Cooperation Program Support to Emeritus Prof. Erdal Panayırcı

We are pleased to announce that the project, coordinated by

(KHAS Electrical-Electronics Engineering Department), “

Nonlinear and Inseparable Radar And Data (NIRAD) Transmission Framework for Pareto Efficient Spectrum Access in Future Wireless Networks,”

has been funded by TÜBİTAK-NSF Bilateral Cooperation Program with the partnership of

Prof. Vincent H. Poor

from the Princeton University.

We congratulate our faculty member for his achievement.
